lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Welcome to the museum of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got some questions regarding Fossil Island.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Ah, how can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I do with fossils I find on Fossil Island?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: I'm not entirely sure just yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nevermind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any interesting news?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Yes, we found a rather interesting island to the North of Morytania. We believe that it may be of archaeological significance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh? That sounds interesting.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Indeed. We are making the final preparations for our voyage, in fact, you may be just the person we are looking for... Assuming you've got the necessary qualifications, that is.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would I qualify then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any interesting news?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: We've seen some incredible specimens come back from Fossil Island!

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Be sure to bring anything you find back for examination - we've got a brand new Palaeontology room downstairs dedicated to finds from the island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know where I could find any treasure?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Look around you! This museum is full of treasures!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I meant treasures for ME.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Any treasures this museum knows about it goes to great lengths to acquire.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Well, firstly you'll need to do a bit of work around the museum, then maybe we can talk.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh dear. You'll need 250 rubies, a Digsite pendant, 100 cosmic runes and 500 fire runes with you I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Why, I can give you one now if you wish?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh, well done! You managed to get both halves of the certificate!

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Welcome to the museum of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some relics you might be interested in.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh, wonderful! We are always eager to expand out collection!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found them in some ruins underneath Ice Mountain.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Ruins? Beneath Ice Mountain? That's the first I've heard of this! What did you find down there?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: An entire city!

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: A city?! How? Which one? Was anyone living there?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just one person - an Imcando dwarf named Ramarno. He said the city was called Camdozaal.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: CAMDOZAAL!? You found the lost Imcando city of Camdozaal!?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not on purpose! It's a long story.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: I'm lost for words! You accidentally found the lost city of Camdozaal! Please let me see these relics.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Hmm, this is certainly not of Imcando design. Maybe it's from an older civilisation. How did you come across it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found it encased in ore. I had to crack it open and chip off the hardened parts. This was underneath.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: My word, a true mystery of an item? How did it get down there?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Thank you, kind [sir/lady]! Pass them over to me and I'll identify them properly.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: This Ancient globe seems to show new constellations. What a discovery!

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: I wonder what secrets this Ancient ledger holds. It's a unique find!

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: An Ancient astroscope. I have only read of such things but to see one, incredible!

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: I'm not even familiar with the glyphs in this Ancient treatise. It's the first time I've seen them.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: What a find, this Ancient carcanet has never been documented before, but I'm certain it had a ceremonial purpose.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: We already have examples of these other relics in the museum, but they will add nicely to our collection.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Welcome to the museum of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found a strange relic while salvaging...

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Why yes, that does look rather interesting. The museum would gladly take that off your hands, and I think we could reward you with an item from our lamp collection in return.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh, there's an inscription on the back... 'There is an empire of darkness where hope flickers and dies.' Well, that's certainly ominous...

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Anyway, thank you for bringing it to us. We'll make sure it's taken care of.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I think I'll keep it.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh... very well.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Hmm.... while it is interesting, I'm afraid you've already brought us one just like it. We'd still be happy to take it off your hands, but I'm afraid we can only offer a monetary reward of 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: The museum thanks you for your generosity.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Welcome to the museum of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found a strange relic while salvaging...

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Why yes, that does look rather interesting. The museum would gladly take that off your hands, and I think we could reward you with an item from our lamp collection in return.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh, there's some words carved into the side here... 'There is an open wound that bleeds only darkness.' Rather dark for a children's toy, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Anyway, thank you for bringing it to us. We'll make sure it's taken care of.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I think I'll keep it.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh... very well.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Hmm.... while it is interesting, I'm afraid you've already brought us one just like it. We'd still be happy to take it off your hands, but I'm afraid we can only offer a monetary reward of 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: The museum thanks you for your generosity.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Welcome to the museum of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found a strange relic while salvaging...

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Why yes, that does look rather interesting. The museum would gladly take that off your hands, and I think we could reward you with an item from our lamp collection in return.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh, there's something etched into the blade... 'There is a stranger who wears a black mask under their skin.' That sounds... unpleasant.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Anyway, thank you for bringing it to us. We'll make sure it's taken care of.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I think I'll keep it.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh... very well.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Hmm.... while it is interesting, I'm afraid you've already brought us one just like it. We'd still be happy to take it off your hands, but I'm afraid we can only offer a monetary reward of 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: The museum thanks you for your generosity.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Welcome to the museum of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found a strange relic while salvaging...

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Why yes, that does look rather interesting. The museum would gladly take that off your hands, and I think we could reward you with an item from our lamp collection in return.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh, there's something written here... 'There is an ocean of souls where you are one day fated to swim.' Can you... swim in souls? Is that even possible?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Anyway, thank you for bringing it to us. We'll make sure it's taken care of.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I think I'll keep it.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh... very well.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Hmm.... while it is interesting, I'm afraid you've already brought us one just like it. We'd still be happy to take it off your hands, but I'm afraid we can only offer a monetary reward of 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: The museum thanks you for your generosity.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Welcome to the museum of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found a strange relic while salvaging...

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Why yes, that does look rather interesting. The museum would gladly take that off your hands, and I think we could reward you with an item from our lamp collection in return.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh, someone's etched something into the face... 'There is a choir of souls who you will one day meet.' That sounds rather macabre, doesn't it?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Anyway, thank you for bringing it to us. We'll make sure it's taken care of.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I think I'll keep it.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh... very well.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Hmm.... while it is interesting, I'm afraid you've already brought us one just like it. We'd still be happy to take it off your hands, but I'm afraid we can only offer a monetary reward of 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: The museum thanks you for your generosity.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Welcome to the museum of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found a strange relic while salvaging...

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Why yes, that does look rather interesting. The museum would gladly take that off your hands, and I think we could reward you with an item from our lamp collection in return.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh, there's something carved in here... 'There is a king who presides over a court of corpses.' Hmm... I can't think of which king that could be referring to...

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Anyway, thank you for bringing it to us. We'll make sure it's taken care of.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I think I'll keep it.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh... very well.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Hmm.... while it is interesting, I'm afraid you've already brought us one just like it. We'd still be happy to take it off your hands, but I'm afraid we can only offer a monetary reward of 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: The museum thanks you for your generosity.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Welcome to the museum of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found a strange relic while salvaging...

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Why yes, that does look rather interesting. The museum would gladly take that off your hands, and I think we could reward you with an item from our lamp collection in return.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh, there's words on the arm here... 'There is a monument built in honour of the suffering you desire.' Well, I certainly don't desire suffering, thank you very much!

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Anyway, thank you for bringing it to us. We'll make sure it's taken care of.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I think I'll keep it.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh... very well.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Hmm.... while it is interesting, I'm afraid you've already brought us one just like it. We'd still be happy to take it off your hands, but I'm afraid we can only offer a monetary reward of 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: The museum thanks you for your generosity.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Welcome to the museum of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found a strange relic while salvaging...

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Why yes, that does look rather interesting. The museum would gladly take that off your hands, and I think we could reward you with an item from our lamp collection in return.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh, there's an inscription on the back... 'There is a priest who prays for the oceans of dead.' Well, good for the dead, I suppose.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Anyway, thank you for bringing it to us. We'll make sure it's taken care of.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I think I'll keep it.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh... very well.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Hmm.... while it is interesting, I'm afraid you've already brought us one just like it. We'd still be happy to take it off your hands, but I'm afraid we can only offer a monetary reward of 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: The museum thanks you for your generosity.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: You know, that's quite a few items you've brought us that have some sort of strange text on them...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you think they're all connected somehow?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Well, it is rather... Rather...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Rather?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: [player name]...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: When the darkness falls upon you, do you see the spires of the eternal city? When you look upon it, do you hear the songs from within?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you alright?!

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: The choir sings in unison... but the song is one of silence. It cuts through the waves and pierces the veil, until only one question remains...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this?!

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Oh, sorry about that. I lost my train of thought for a moment there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are... you sure? You said some strange things a moment ago.

lines.speaker: Curator Haig Halen
lines.text: Hmm? I was just talking about how you keep finding things with these rather strange phrases on them. Slightly chilling, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Slightly chilling... yeah...
